questions.text: The SI unit of stress is:
questions.explanation: Stress = Force/Area, so SI unit is N/m² or Pascal (Pa)

questions.text: Hooke's law states that stress is proportional to strain within elastic limit.
questions.explanation: Hooke's law: Within elastic limit, stress ∝ strain. The constant of proportionality is Young's modulus.

questions.text: Young's modulus has the same SI unit as ________.
questions.explanation: Young's modulus Y = stress/strain. Since strain is dimensionless, Y has same unit as stress: N/m² or Pa

questions.correctAnswer: The energy stored in a body when it is stretched or compressed within elastic limit is called elastic potential energy.
questions.explanation: Elastic potential energy U = (1/2) × stress × strain × volume = (1/2)kx² for a spring.
